RANGE - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.NumberInputOption
input must be >= lower limit and <= upper limit

Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
removeChoice(int) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
remove the choice at the specified index, can't be done once pre-selection processing has happened
run() - Method in interface timgutilities.textio.RunnableWithException
a runnable that can throw exceptions, but also returns a result
runIt() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.RunnableCommand
execute the command, if an exception is thrown return the details, otherwise return the string output from the command
RunnableCommand - Class in timgutilities.textio
This class represents a command that can be run in a command loop.

RunnableWithException - Interface in timgutilities.textio
a runnable for command execution,
